generated_oml:
instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, Sinumerik840DController, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder for position measurement of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder for position measurement of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for measuring motor current I_M of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot, input current I_M, output torque τ_M"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot, torque τ_G"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot, torque τ_out"
]

instance Sinumerik840DController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for controlling the first axis"
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance PositionDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position angle data trace with metadata"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data trace with metadata"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data from robot dynamics model with metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs data for comparison with measured data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) for structural modeling of the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation models for friction dynamics (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization for integrated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction model identification using Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersIdentified
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for integrated data from sensor streams and simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualization
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through model-based control algorithm updates"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmUpdate
]

instance FrictionParametersIdentified : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction parameters identified from simulated vs measured data comparison"
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integrated data visualization dashboard for real-time monitoring"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmUpdate : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of control algorithms based on friction parameter insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time processing with continuous data streaming and synchronization for live monitoring and model updating."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical robot sensors, MQTT data streaming, SysML/Simulink models, processing components for friction identification, and unified dashboard for visualization, all focused on the first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated, utilizing live operational data during robot motion for continuous friction model refinement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated vs measured data deviations; multi-physics-aware friction model identification with white-box and black-box models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from sensors to digital shadow processing components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling and data representation."
]
